<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.0.3 Chrome/140.0.7339.249 Electron/38.7.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.0.3" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="dCzgIKGXSn6UlmG0JTh-"> <mxGraphModel dx="2084" dy="1512" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="850" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" value="" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;pointerEvents=0;align=center;verticalAlign=top;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=12;fontColor=default;fillColor=default;gradientColor=none;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1040" y="2280" width="1680" height="700" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" value="git push" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;fillColor=#ffcc99;strokeColor=#36393d;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1080" y="2660" width="152.03" height="62.54" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" value="Branch?" style="rhombus;strokeWidth=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1363.46" y="2402.58" width="166.88" height="159.36" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" value="build-and-test" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1807.482993197279" y="2320" width="191.81632653061226" height="61.06007067137809" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" value="build-and-test
